title: exogonium bracteatum var. pubescens
intro: Exogonium bracteatum var. pubescens, also known as the hairy exogonium, is a plant species in the Asclepiadaceae family, native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Exogonium bracteatum var. pubescens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
